*''[[Breaking Brad]]'' (mentioned) |status = Unknown}} {{Quote|Well, I went down and got my life.|[[Hunter X-05]]|Breaking Brad}} '''Bradley "Brad" Wolfe''' was an actor before his life was stolen by a [[Hunter X-05|Variant]] of himself. ==Biography== {{Quote|Think about it. [[Hunter X-05|He]] found [[Sylvie Laufeydottir|her]], but maybe didn't turn her in because he wants to continue to live his best life on the [[Sacred Timeline|timeline]]."
"He wants more time to be Brad Wolfe.|[[Mobius M. Mobius]] and [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Breaking Brad}} Brad Wolfe was a renowned actor until he was suddenly replaced by a Variant of himself known as [[Hunter X-05]] who stole his life and made it his own.{{Ref|LK202}}[https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-features/loki-season-2-episode-4-jonathan-majors-1235630252/ ‘Loki’ Head Writer Eric Martin Talks Episode Four’s Explosive Ending: “There’s Meaning in All of It”] ==Abilities== *'''Performer''': Wolfe was a renowned actor, causing him to get replaced by [[Hunter X-05]], who wanted his life. ==Relationships== ===Enemies=== *[[Hunter X-05|Brad Wolfe/Hunter X-05]] - Alternate Self ==References== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Mentioned Only Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Brown Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Performers]]
